_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: The gene set enrichment analysis with ClusterProfiler demonstrated that among the top 10 KEGG pathways affected, the HIF-1α signaling pathway featured prominently
details: Successfully identified HIF-1α signaling pathway as prominently featured among top 10 KEGG pathways affected by FT895
